tasks.description: Add `forma-report-professor = "forma.cli_report_professor:main"` entry to pyproject.toml under `[project.scripts]`
Write tests for QuestionClassStats, StudentSummaryRow, ProfessorReportData dataclass instantiation and defaults in tests/test_professor_report_data.py

Write tests for build_professor_report_data() — class statistics computation (mean, std, median, q1, q3), level distribution, student row construction, sorting, z-score calculation in tests/test_professor_report_data.py
Write tests for PROFESSOR_ANALYSIS_SYSTEM_INSTRUCTION, render_professor_overall_assessment_prompt(), render_professor_teaching_suggestions_prompt() in tests/test_prompt_templates.py
Implement QuestionClassStats, StudentSummaryRow, ProfessorReportData dataclasses in src/forma/professor_report_data.py (fields per data-model.md)

Implement build_professor_report_data(students, distributions, class_name, week_num, subject, exam_title) → ProfessorReportData in src/forma/professor_report_data.py — compute class stats with np.nanmean/np.nanstd, per-question stats, build StudentSummaryRows sorted desc, compute z-scores, compute overall_level as mode with conservative tie-break

Add PROFESSOR_ANALYSIS_SYSTEM_INSTRUCTION, PROFESSOR_OVERALL_ASSESSMENT_TEMPLATE, PROFESSOR_TEACHING_SUGGESTIONS_TEMPLATE, render_professor_overall_assessment_prompt(), render_professor_teaching_suggestions_prompt() to src/forma/prompt_templates.py — use string.Template with pre-formatted numeric values, XML data tags

phases.name: User Story 1 — Class Overview Report Generation (P1 MVP)

tasks.description: Write tests for ProfessorReportChartGenerator.__init__ and _save_fig() returning valid BytesIO PNG in tests/test_professor_report_charts.py — mock FontProperties for CI
Write tests for score_histogram() — normal scores, zero variance, single student, empty list in tests/test_professor_report_charts.py
Write tests for level_donut() — normal distribution, single level 100%, total=0 safety, all four levels in tests/test_professor_report_charts.py
Write tests for question_difficulty_bar() — multiple questions, single question, varying means in tests/test_professor_report_charts.py

Write tests for ProfessorPDFReportGenerator.__init__ and cover page + summary section rendering in tests/test_professor_report.py — mock SimpleDocTemplate, verify story list contains expected flowables

Implement ProfessorReportChartGenerator.__init__(font_path, dpi) and _save_fig(fig) in src/forma/professor_report_charts.py — matplotlib.use("Agg") at module top, import _LEVEL_COLORS from report_charts, FontProperties for Korean, BytesIO pattern with plt.close(fig) in finally block
Implement score_histogram(scores, bins=10) in src/forma/professor_report_charts.py — histogram with mean/median lines, handles zero variance and empty list
Implement level_donut(level_dist) in src/forma/professor_report_charts.py — proportional donut with count labels, guard total=0 with "데이터 없음" text image, level colors from _LEVEL_COLORS
Implement question_difficulty_bar(stats: list[QuestionClassStats]) in src/forma/professor_report_charts.py — horizontal bar chart of per-question ensemble_mean, color-coded by difficulty

Implement ProfessorPDFReportGenerator.__init__(font_path, dpi) in src/forma/professor_report.py — register NanumGothic/NanumGothicBold fonts, define ParagraphStyles (title 18pt, section 14pt, subsection 11pt, body 10pt, table_header 8pt bold white, table_data 8pt), define _LEVEL_COLORS using HexColor

Implement _build_cover_page(report_data) and _build_summary_section(report_data) in src/forma/professor_report.py — cover: title + metadata table (class, subject, week, date, student count); summary: statistics card (mean, median, SD, Q1, Q3, at-risk count/pct), embed score_histogram + level_donut + question_difficulty_bar charts via Image flowable, embed concept_mastery_heatmap as class-wide concept overview (placed after question difficulty bar)

Write tests for conditional formatting helpers — compute_conditional_indicator(score, mean, std) returning "+"/"-"/"", background color selection, zero-variance disabling in tests/test_professor_report_data.py

Write tests for _build_comparison_table(report_data) — correct row count, column structure (2-level header with SPAN), sort order, Korean level labels ("상"/"중상"/"중하"/"하"), adaptive columns (3-col for <=3 questions, 2-col for 4+) in tests/test_professor_report.py

Implement compute_conditional_indicator(score, mean, std) and get_conditional_bg_color(score, mean, std) in src/forma/professor_report_data.py — returns "+"/"-"/"" based on ±0.5*SD threshold, returns HexColor (#E8F5E9 green / #FFEBEE red / white), neutral when std==0

Implement _build_comparison_table(report_data) in src/forma/professor_report.py — 2-level header (row0: SPAN groups for each question, row1: sub-columns), student rows sorted by overall_ensemble_mean desc, Korean level abbreviations, conditional formatting per cell, adaptive column strategy (3 sub-cols for <=3 questions, 2 sub-cols for 4+), min font 8pt, header bg #37474F white text; embed student_rank_lollipop chart after the comparison table as a visual score distribution

Write tests for identify_at_risk(row, class_mean, class_std, misconception_counts) — test each of 6 criteria independently, test OR logic, test edge cases (std=0 skips z-score criterion, empty per_question_levels with all() returning True guard, Advanced student with 3+ misconceptions not flagged) in tests/test_professor_report_data.py

Write tests for at-risk visual indicators in comparison table — "!" prefix on rank cell, row background #FFEBEE, LINEBEFORE 2.5pt red, at-risk summary section with count and percentage in tests/test_professor_report.py

Implement identify_at_risk(row, class_mean, class_std, misconception_counts) in src/forma/professor_report_data.py — 6 criteria with OR logic: (1) score<0.45, (2) z<-1.0, (3) all Beginning, (4) any coverage==0.0, (5) misconceptions>=3 AND not Advanced, (6) avg coverage<0.30; returns (bool, list[str] reasons); guard against empty iterables

Update _build_comparison_table() in src/forma/professor_report.py to apply at-risk visual indicators — "!" prefix on rank cell text, row background BACKGROUND #FFEBEE, LINEBEFORE (0, 0) to (-1, row) 2.5pt red for at-risk rows
Implement _build_at_risk_summary(report_data) in src/forma/professor_report.py — summary table/paragraph showing n_at_risk, pct_at_risk, placed on final page or after comparison table

Write tests for generate_professor_analysis() — success case (mock LLMProvider), partial failure (one call fails, other succeeds), total failure (both fail → fallback), empty response → fallback, PII absence verification in tests/test_professor_report_llm.py
Write tests for _build_fallback_overall() and _build_fallback_suggestions() — correct f-string interpolation, non-empty output, no format errors in tests/test_professor_report_llm.py

Write tests for _render_overall_assessment_prompt() and _render_teaching_suggestions_prompt() — verify XML data tags present, no student PII in rendered prompt, all stats included in tests/test_professor_report_llm.py

Write tests for LLM analysis page rendering in tests/test_professor_report.py — overall assessment section, teaching suggestions section, model metadata display, fallback text display when llm_generation_failed=True

Implement _render_overall_assessment_prompt(report_data) and _render_teaching_suggestions_prompt(report_data) in src/forma/professor_report_llm.py — build plain-text class statistics summary wrapped in <class_data> XML tags, use string.Template for prompt body with pre-formatted numeric values, include level distribution, per-question stats, misconception frequencies

Implement _build_fallback_overall(report_data) and _build_fallback_suggestions(report_data) in src/forma/professor_report_llm.py — f-string based summaries using ProfessorReportData fields, no string.Template (research decision #2)

Implement generate_professor_analysis(provider, report_data) in src/forma/professor_report_llm.py — call provider.generate() with system_instruction=PROFESSOR_ANALYSIS_SYSTEM_INSTRUCTION, max_tokens/temperature per named constants, independent try/except per call, strip markdown from response, set report_data.overall_assessment / teaching_suggestions / llm_model_used / llm_generation_failed / llm_error_message

Implement _build_llm_analysis_page(report_data) in src/forma/professor_report.py — render overall_assessment and teaching_suggestions as Paragraph flowables with _esc(), show model metadata (llm_model_used, generation_date), show fallback notice if llm_generation_failed
Write tests for concept_mastery_heatmap() — multiple concepts × questions, empty concepts, single question in tests/test_professor_report_charts.py
Write tests for student_rank_lollipop() — normal (20 students), large (60 students → top/bottom 25), at-risk highlighting, all same score in tests/test_professor_report_charts.py
Write tests for question_level_stacked_bar() — all 4 levels present, single level 100%, zero total safety in tests/test_professor_report_charts.py

Write tests for _build_question_detail_page(stats) — mini stats table, stacked bar chart embedded, concept mastery table, misconception list, empty concepts fallback "No concept data available" in tests/test_professor_report.py
Implement concept_mastery_heatmap(data, concepts, questions) in src/forma/professor_report_charts.py — color-coded heatmap of concept mastery rates across questions, handle empty concepts gracefully

Implement student_rank_lollipop(rows, highlight_at_risk=True) in src/forma/professor_report_charts.py — horizontal lollipop chart sorted by score, at-risk students in red, >50 students → top/bottom 25 with "..." gap indicator
Implement question_level_stacked_bar(level_dist, question_sn) in src/forma/professor_report_charts.py — horizontal stacked bar of level percentages, guard total=0, color from _LEVEL_COLORS

Implement _build_question_detail_page(stats: QuestionClassStats, chart_gen) in src/forma/professor_report.py — mini statistics table (ensemble mean/std/median, concept_coverage_mean, llm_score_mean), embed stacked bar chart, concept mastery table (concept name + mastery rate %), misconception list (text + frequency, sorted desc), handle missing concepts with "개념 데이터 없음" text
Write tests for _build_parser() — all required args, optional args with defaults, help text in tests/test_cli_report_professor.py

Write tests for main() — success path (mock all modules), missing file → exit 1, insufficient students → exit 2, font not found → exit 3, no API key without skip-llm → exit 4, --skip-llm skips LLM provider creation, --verbose sets DEBUG logging in tests/test_cli_report_professor.py

Implement _build_parser() in src/forma/cli_report_professor.py — argparse with --final, --config, --eval-dir, --output-dir (required); --forma-config, --class-name, --skip-llm, --font-path, --dpi, --verbose (optional); Korean help descriptions per Constitution II

Implement main() in src/forma/cli_report_professor.py — validation (file existence, DPI 72-600, output dir writable), logging config, data load via load_all_student_data(), student count check (>=3 → exit 2), build_professor_report_data(), conditional LLM provider creation + generate_professor_analysis(), ProfessorPDFReportGenerator.generate_pdf(), exit codes per contracts/cli-contract.md

Implement generate_pdf(report_data, output_dir) orchestration in src/forma/professor_report.py — build story list from all sections (cover → summary with heatmap → comparison table with lollipop → at-risk summary → question details with stacked bars → LLM analysis), create SimpleDocTemplate, doc.build(story), return output path with sanitized filename professor_{class}_w{week}_report.pdf

Add edge case tests: zero-variance class, exactly 3 students, 200 students, NaN values in scores, empty concept lists, empty misconception lists, mismatched student counts across YAML files in tests/test_professor_report_data.py
Add edge case tests: special characters in student names, 2000+ char AI response, markup in AI response escaped, Korean text rendering verification in tests/test_professor_report.py
Add chart edge case tests: all-zero scores histogram, single-student lollipop, 100-char misconception text truncation to 60 chars in tests/test_professor_report_charts.py

Run full test suite `pytest tests/test_professor_report_data.py tests/test_professor_report_charts.py tests/test_professor_report_llm.py tests/test_professor_report.py tests/test_cli_report_professor.py -v` and fix any failures
Add performance benchmark test: generate report for 200 synthetic students and assert wall-clock time < 60 seconds (SC-001) in tests/test_professor_report_data.py or tests/test_professor_report.py
Run quickstart.md integration scenarios with real evaluation data from results/ directory
Visual inspection of generated PDF — verify all pages, charts, tables, formatting, Korean text rendering
